channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Webb detects methane and strange chemistry on interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS
item.description: The James Webb Space Telescope found unusual chemistry on comet 3I/ATLAS, including the first direct detection of methane.

item.title: Cancer's favorite escape trick may actually make it easier to kill
item.description: Researchers discovered a surprising immune system mechanism that challenges long-held beliefs in immunology.

item.title: Beluga whales frequently switch mates, potentially aiding species survival
item.description: Beluga whales in Alaska's Arctic waters have hidden family lives. DNA analysis of over 600 belugas reveals frequent mate-switching.

item.title: Venus to be hidden by the Moon in a rare June celestial event
item.description: June's night sky features notable events, including a close Venus-Jupiter pairing after sunset and Mercury joining them.
